steps: The question asks which equation has the same solution, i.e., which equation is equivalent to $4x = 12$.

• Choice A — '$4x = 108$': Gives $x = 27$, not 3. ✗
  • Choice B — '$4x = 24$': Gives $x = 6$, not 3. ✗
  • Choice C — '$4x = 12$': Gives $x = 3$, same solution as the original equation. ✓
  • Choice D — '$4x = 3$': Gives $x = 0.75$, not 3. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
